---
title: "PhD Party"
format:
  pjk_theme-html:
    toc: false
    navbar: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script data-goatcounter="https://pjkreutzer.goatcounter.com/count"
          async src="//gc.zgo.at/count.js"></script>
          <style>
            @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Josefin+Sans:wght@300;400&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&display=swap');

            body {
              background-color: #FDEEEF;
              margin: 0;
              padding: 0;
              min-height: 100vh;
            }

            #quarto-content {
              background-color: #FDEEEF;
            }

            .invite-wrapper {
              background-color: #FDEEEF;
              max-width: 550px;
              margin: 0 auto;
              padding: 2rem 1.5rem 3rem;
              position: relative;
              min-height: 90vh;
              display: flex;
              flex-direction: column;
            }

            /* Top title: PhDs */
            .top-title {
              font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
              font-weight: 900;
              font-size: clamp(5rem, 18vw, 9rem);
              line-height: 0.85;
              color: #1a1a2e;
              margin: 0;
              padding: 0;
              z-index: 2;
              position: relative;
            }

            /* Photo container */
            .photo-container {
              position: relative;
              margin-top: -4.5rem;
              z-index: 1;
              width: 100%;
            }

            .photo-container img {
              width: 100%;
              height: auto;
              display: block;
            }

            .photo-placeholder {
              width: 100%;
              aspect-ratio: 3 / 4;
              background-color: #d4cfa0;
              display: flex;
              align-items: center;
              justify-content: center;
              color: #8a8560;
              font-family: sans-serif;
              font-size: 0.9rem;
              letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            }

            /* Right vertical text: First Floor */
            .side-title {
              font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
              font-weight: 900;
              font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 12vw, 6.5rem);
              line-height: 0.85;
              color: #1a1a2e;
              writing-mode: vertical-rl;
              text-orientation: mixed;
              position: absolute;
              right: -2rem;
              top: 8rem;
              z-index: 2;
              margin: 0;
              padding: 0;
            }

            /* Event details */
            .event-details {
              margin-top: 1.5rem;
              z-index: 2;
              position: relative;
            }

            .event-details .join-text {
              font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
              font-weight: 700;
              font-size: 1.1rem;
              letter-spacing: 0.08em;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              color: #1a1a2e;
              margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
            }

            .event-details .detail-line {
              font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
              font-weight: 300;
              font-size: 1rem;
              letter-spacing: 0.05em;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              color: #1a1a2e;
              line-height: 1.6;
            }

            .event-details .rsvp-line {
              font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
              font-weight: 300;
              font-size: 1rem;
              letter-spacing: 0.05em;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              color: #1a1a2e;
              margin-top: 1.5rem;
            }

            /* Confetti */
            .confetti-container {
              position: fixed;
              top: 0;
              left: 0;
              width: 100%;
              height: 100%;
              pointer-events: none;
              z-index: 9999;
              overflow: hidden;
            }

            .confetti {
              position: absolute;
              top: -10px;
              width: 10px;
              height: 10px;
              opacity: 0;
              animation: confetti-fall 4s ease-in forwards;
            }

            .confetti:nth-child(odd) { border-radius: 50%; }
            .confetti:nth-child(3n) { width: 8px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; }
            .confetti:nth-child(5n) { width: 6px; height: 6px; }

            @keyframes confetti-fall {
              0%   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
              100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg) scale(0.5); }
            }

            .confetti:nth-child(1)  { left:  3%; animation-delay: 0.0s; animation-duration: 3.5s; background: #875E29; }
            .confetti:nth-child(2)  { left:  8%; animation-delay: 0.2s; animation-duration: 4.0s; background: #22458A; }
            .confetti:nth-child(3)  { left: 13%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 3.8s; background: #D9EBDB; }
            .confetti:nth-child(4)  { left: 18%; animation-delay: 0.4s; animation-duration: 4.2s; background: #F0EEE5; }
            .confetti:nth-child(5)  { left: 23%; animation-delay: 0.3s; animation-duration: 3.6s; background: #875E29; }
            .confetti:nth-child(6)  { left: 28%; animation-delay: 0.5s; animation-duration: 4.1s; background: #22458A; }
            .confetti:nth-child(7)  { left: 33%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 3.9s; background: #F0F7F1; }
            .confetti:nth-child(8)  { left: 38%; animation-delay: 0.6s; animation-duration: 3.7s; background: #875E29; }
            .confetti:nth-child(9)  { left: 43%; animation-delay: 0.2s; animation-duration: 4.3s; background: #D9EBDB; }
            .confetti:nth-child(10) { left: 48%; animation-delay: 0.4s; animation-duration: 3.5s; background: #22458A; }
            .confetti:nth-child(11) { left: 53%; animation-delay: 0.3s; animation-duration: 4.0s; background: #F0EEE5; }
            .confetti:nth-child(12) { left: 58%; animation-delay: 0.7s; animation-duration: 3.8s; background: #875E29; }
            .confetti:nth-child(13) { left: 63%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 4.1s; background: #22458A; }
            .confetti:nth-child(14) { left: 68%; animation-delay: 0.5s; animation-duration: 3.6s; background: #D9EBDB; }
            .confetti:nth-child(15) { left: 73%; animation-delay: 0.2s; animation-duration: 4.2s; background: #F0F7F1; }
            .confetti:nth-child(16) { left: 78%; animation-delay: 0.6s; animation-duration: 3.9s; background: #875E29; }
            .confetti:nth-child(17) { left: 83%; animation-delay: 0.3s; animation-duration: 3.7s; background: #22458A; }
            .confetti:nth-child(18) { left: 88%; animation-delay: 0.8s; animation-duration: 4.0s; background: #F0EEE5; }
            .confetti:nth-child(19) { left: 93%; animation-delay: 0.1s; animation-duration: 4.3s; background: #D9EBDB; }
            .confetti:nth-child(20) { left: 97%; animation-delay: 0.4s; animation-duration: 3.5s; background: #875E29; }

            /* Hide default quarto elements */
            #title-block-header { display: none; }
            .page-columns { padding: 0; }
            main.content { padding: 0; margin: 0; }
          </style>
---

::: {.confetti-container}
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
<div class="confetti"></div>
:::

::: {.invite-wrapper}

[PhDs]{.top-title}

[First Floor]{.side-title}

::: {.photo-container}
![](images/party-photo.png)
:::

::: {.event-details}

[Join us to celebrate]{.join-text}

[May 30, 2026 at 20:00<br>Propellergatan 2B, 211 15 Malmö<br>Anton, Jonathan, Jonas & Youssouf]{.detail-line}

:::

:::
